<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions of all key objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['b', 'c', 'M', 'Y', 'N', 'W']:
        b = node['boundary']
        if len(b) >= 3:
            print(f"{node['color']}: rows {b[0][0]}-{b[2][0]}, cols {b[0][1]}-{b[1][1]}, pixels={node['pixels']}")
        else:
            print(f"{node['color']}: boundary={b}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

# The top bar changed from N=64 to N=53, W=11. SPACE seems to affect the progress bar.
# Let me check if moving blue rect to touch other objects does something.
# Blue rect is now at rows 8-11 (after 2 UP moves from 16-19)

# Magenta is at rows 4-7, cols 36-39

# Let me try moving blue rect to overlap with the magenta block

# But first let me check exact position

    if node['color'] == 'b':

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
